overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a stylized, distorted urban cityscape at night resembling a futuristic Las Vegas. The player navigates through a surreal, low-poly environment featuring the Aria hotel tower and other illuminated glass skyscrapers with vibrant neon lighting against a dark sky.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a surreal white ramp ascending toward a floating pink crystal. The Aria tower and golden glass buildings are visible in the distance against the night sky as the camera moves steadily forward and upward.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the ramp into a wide plaza, the camera turns to reveal a neon-lit cityscape with the Aria tower now on the left. Blue-lit and golden glass skyscrapers surround the open area as the player surveys the environment.

segments.scene_description: The player navigates along city streets passing rocky outcrops and modern architecture. The Aria tower shifts to the right side as the camera moves past a curved glass building and enters an area with green neon lighting.

entered.detail: confined walkway between tall building structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows close exploration of the building base, with the camera looking up at the Aria tower signage. The player moves through a narrow passage between the curved glass structure and the Aria tower, examining the architectural details up close.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a surreal white ramp into the heart of a neon-lit, distorted urban cityscape. It begins by moving steadily forward and upward along the ramp toward a floating pink crystal, with the Aria tower and golden glass buildings looming in the distance. As the camera emerges into a wide plaza, the view expands to reveal a surrounding array of blue-lit and golden skyscrapers before turning to navigate city streets lined with rocky outcrops and modern architecture. The scene then shifts as the camera passes a curved glass building and enters an area bathed in green neon lighting, with the Aria tower transitioning to the right side of the frame. Finally, the movement narrows into a passage between the curved structure and the tower, tilting upward to examine the architectural details and signage of the Aria tower up close.
